residual_risk: Review was limited to the submitted diff and in-scope submitted-command matching behavior. RecoveryOptionService mutation-time reconciliation is out of this task scope.

blocking_findings: AI TUI foreground input could clear metadata on unmatched prompt input.
Quoted executable paths with spaces were parsed incorrectly.
Icon clone path preserved shape without revalidating safe built-in/text icon values.
iterations.resolution: Callback was limited to shell-submitted commands, quote-aware tokenization was added, and icon metadata cloning was constrained to the safe built-in/text contract.

blocking_findings: WorkspaceService used platform-dependent path.basename normalization for Windows command paths.
iterations.resolution: Recovery matching now normalizes executable tokens with separator-agnostic basename logic.
